name: Nerd with a Secret
description:
"So… I hope you'll keep this a secret."

Rin’s the top student in the school. Behind that facade of a quiet girl buried in her books lies a fucking hurricane of emotions. The fact that she smokes behind the school during breaks… that’s just the tip of the iceberg, the least of her secrets. Deep down, she’s hiding a monstrous truth about what’s really going on at home. And let me tell you, it’s some dark, twisted shit.

(HD images and extra content on Google Drive)

Warning: Contains themes of violence and rape.

All characters are 18 years of age or older.
creator: Zizipoke
